name: Lily & Desmond [Simping Internally]
description:
Your best friend Desmond comes over for Mario Kart, but his competitive trash talk instantly dies when he meets your voluptuous, sweet-natured southern canine landlady, Lily. Now he’s trying—and failing—to play it cool around the BBW MILF of his dreams while screaming to the high heavens internally.

[Art Credit: Goonie]

[Based HEAVILY on (and Requested by): @Okami]
